headline: 3 Quality Compounders Worth Your Attention
summary: Quality compounders are flywheels. Said differently, they’re businesses that generate heaps of profits and consistently reinvest them to produce even more profits. Rinse and repeat.

headline: Dexcom gets a new Buy rating at Benchmark on expected margin expansion
summary: Investing.com -- Benchmark on Monday started coverage of Dexcom with a Buy rating and a $77 price target, arguing the medical technology company is on track to expand margins meaningfully over the next two years as it rolls out a new sensor platform and ramps up lower-cost manufacturing.

headline: Here Are Tuesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Autodesk, Celanese, DexCom, FormFactor, GitLab, Lowe’s, Matador Resources, Toast and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: The futures are trading lower on Tuesday, but another week and another set of new highs for the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq, as AI fever overshadowed Iran’s peace counteroffer dismissal on Monday. The stock market opened lower on the rejection of President Trump’s peace offering, but buyers once again circled the ... headline: ViCentra Announces Commercial Launch of New Smartphone-Controlled Kaleido Automated Insulin Delivery Patch Pump System
summary: New system combines Kaleido with Diabeloop’s DBLG2 algorithm and Dexcom G7, with first commercial deliveries in Germany and the Netherlands planned for later this summerEnables insulin automation to be controlled directly from the user’s smartphone, rather than a separate dedicated handsetStarting on Kaleido today with Diabeloop’s DBLG1 algorithm is the fastest path to Kaleido with DBLG2 and Dexcom G7 UTRECHT, The Netherlands, May 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ViCentra, a European medical device
